info.title: Aquifer API Documentation
info.description:
All endpoints require an API key in the `api-key` header.

The following videos are available for anyone new to working with APIs: Understanding the documentation Making requests with Postman Downloading resources to the file system with C# Why use a web API instead of flat files? React Sample Application Demo

Example applications using the Aquifer API can be found in the samples repository on GitHub.

get.summary: Get resource ids that are new or updated since the given UTC timestamp.
get.description: For a given UTC timestamp, get a list of resource ids that are new or have been updated since the provided timestamp. This is intended for users who are storing Aquifer data locally and want to fetch new content.

parameters.name: startTimestamp
parameters.description:
UTC timestamp (e.g. 07/20/2024) representing the starting time of a range in which to look for new updates. This is required when not
passing the deprecated `Timestamp` property.

parameters.name: endTimestamp
parameters.description:
UTC timestamp (e.g. 07/20/2024) representing the ending time of a range in which to look for new updates. If no value is provided it
will default to UtcNow.

parameters.name: languageId
parameters.description: Optional LanguageId to search on. If none is provided, updates for all languages will be returned.

parameters.name: languageCode
parameters.description: Optional ISO 639-3 code that is 3 characters in length (e.g. "eng").

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The number of results to return. Max is 1000.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Records to skip if paging through results.

parameters.name: resourceCollectionCode
parameters.description:
Optional resource collection code to search for. Search by code retrieved from /resources/collections endpoint such
as "TyndaleBibleDictionary".

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: WARNING: DEPRECATED!  Use `StartTimestamp` instead.  If `StartTimestamp` is provided then this value will be ignored.

get.summary: Get a list of available resource types and collections.
get.description:
Get a list of resource types that are available. Within each resource type will be a list of resource collections
that belong to that resource type. For example, Dictionary is a resource type, and "Bible Dictionary (Tyndale)"
is a collection of resources within that type. The resource type and collection code can be used in other queries.

get.summary: Search resources by keyword query, passage, resource type or collection code, or a combination of the above.
get.description: For a given query, language, and content type, search for matching resources. Can also search by passage, resource type, or resource collection code.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description:
The keyword to search on. Currently only searches against content names (not inside content).
Non-English names are supported. Must be at least 3 characters in length. Optional if a bookCode or a resource type or collection code is
provided.

parameters.name: bookCode
parameters.description:
Book code based off USFM book identifier (e.g. GEN, EXO, etc.). Can get a list of available books and identifiers
from the /bibles/books endpoint. Use this by itself to search across an entire book. Required if no query parameter and no resource type or
collection code are provided.

parameters.name: startChapter
parameters.description: Optional start chapter to search from. If included, must also provide an end chapter. Required with verses.

parameters.name: endChapter
parameters.description: Optional end chapter to search from. Required with start chapter and verses.

parameters.name: startVerse
parameters.description: Optional start verse to search from. If included, must also provide an end verse and chapters.

parameters.name: endVerse
parameters.description: Optional end verse to search from. Required with start verse.

parameters.name: languageId
parameters.description: Optional language id internal to Aquifer. If not specified, language code is required.

parameters.name: languageCode
parameters.description: Optional ISO 639-3 code that is 3 characters in length (e.g. "eng"). If not specified, language id is required.

parameters.name: resourceType
parameters.description:
The type of resource to search for, such as "Dictionary". If none specified, will default to None.
If sending resourceType, do not send resourceCollectionCode.
A resource type or collection code is required if no book code and no query are provided.

parameters.name: resourceCollectionCode
parameters.description:
Optional resource collection code to search for. Search by code retrieved from /resources/types endpoint such as
"TyndaleBibleDictionary". If sending resourceCollectionCode, do not send resourceType.
A resource type or collection code is required if no book code and no query are provided.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The number of results to return. Max is 100.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Records to skip if paging through results.

get.description: For a given resource id, return the data for that resource. This can be text content as well as CDN links for image, audio, and video media types.

parameters.name: contentId
parameters.description: The resource id to return content for. This is included at the end of the path.

parameters.name: contentTextType
parameters.description:
The type of text content to return in the `content` property of the response (JSON is always sent back for the response as a
whole by default). This parameter is optional and defaults to `None`.

If `None` is passed then `Json` will be returned.  `Markdown` and 'Html' can also be requested.

Note that this will be ignored for non-text resources. Content such as images will always return as JSON.

get.summary: Get specific resource information by a different language.
get.description: For a given resource id, return the data for that resource in the alternative language.

parameters.name: languageCode
parameters.description:
Language code (e.g. eng) that the given content id should be sent back in. For example,
if you have the English content id for a specific item, and you want to get the French version, pass "fra" as the value.
If no version exists in the requested language, a 404 will be returned.

get.summary: For a given resource content id, see in what other languages it is available.
get.description: For a given resource content id, return a list of all other languages that are available for this resource.

parameters.name: contentId
parameters.description: The resource content id to check additional languages for

get.description: For a given resource id, return the associations for that resource in its given language. Resource associations are language dependent. In general, all resource associations will be available in English.

get.summary: Get a list of resource collections.
get.description: Returns summary data for all resource collections, optionally filtering by resource type. Note that additional collection information can be retrieved via the individual GET route.

parameters.name: resourceType
parameters.description: The optional type of resource to search for, such as "Dictionary". If none specified, will default to None.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The number of results to return.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Records to skip if paging through results.

get.summary: Get a resource collection with language localization data for the given collection code.
get.description: Returns the resource collection matching the collection code including the count of resource items in each available language.

parameters.name: code
parameters.description: The collection code of the collection to retrieve.

parameters.name: languageIds
parameters.description:
Optional languages to search on by internal Aquifer language id. If no languages are specified then all languages will be returned. Only
one of language ids or codes may be provided.

parameters.name: languageCodes
parameters.description:
Optional languages to search on by ISO 639-3 code that is 3 characters in length (e.g. "eng"). Only one of language ids or codes may be
provided.

get.description: Return a list of languages that can have associated resources in the Aquifer.

get.summary: Get count of resource types per language.
get.description: For a given range, get a count of resources available per language and type.

parameters.name: bookCode
parameters.description:
Required book code based off USFM book identifier (e.g. GEN, EXO, etc.). Can get a list of available books and identifiers
from the /bibles/books endpoint. Use this by itself to search across an entire book.

parameters.name: startChapter
parameters.description: Optional start chapter to search from. If included, must also provide an end chapter. Required with verses.

parameters.name: endChapter
parameters.description: Optional end chapter to search from. Required with start chapter and verses.

parameters.name: startVerse
parameters.description: Optional start verse to search from. If included, must also provide an end verse and chapters.

parameters.name: endVerse
parameters.description: Optional end verse to search from. Required with start verse.

parameters.name: languageCodes
parameters.description:
Optional list of language codes to filter the results to.
Example: `languageCodes=eng&languageCodes=fra`

get.summary: Get the Bible text contained within a book of the Bible.
get.description: For a given Bible and book of the Bible, returns the Bible text (and optional audio information if available) for all verses within the chapter and verse parameters.

parameters.name: bibleId
parameters.description: The id of the Bible for which to return text.

parameters.name: bookCode
parameters.description:
Book code based off USFM book identifier (e.g. GEN, EXO, etc.). Can get a list of available books and identifiers
from the /bibles/books endpoint. This parameter is required.

parameters.name: startChapter
parameters.description: Optional start chapter in the book.

parameters.name: startVerse
parameters.description: Optional start verse in the start chapter.

parameters.name: endChapter
parameters.description: Optional end chapter in the book.

parameters.name: endVerse
parameters.description: Optional end verse in the end chapter.

parameters.name: shouldReturnAudioData
parameters.description: Optional. If true then any available audio information for each chapter and verse will be included in the response.

get.description: For a given optional language id, returns the Bibles in the system including language information, abbreviation codes, whether or not the Bible supports a Greek alignment, and license information.

parameters.name: languageId
parameters.description:
Optional language to search on by internal Aquifer language id. If no language is specified then Bibles for all languages will be returned.
Only one of language id or code may be provided.

parameters.name: languageCode
parameters.description:
Optional language to search on by ISO 639-3 code that is 3 characters in length (e.g. "eng"). If no language value is specified then Bibles
for all languages will be returned. Only one of language id or code may be provided.

parameters.name: isLanguageDefault
parameters.description:
If specified then only language default Bibles (for true) or language non-default Bibles (for false) will be returned. If no
value is provided then all Bibles will be returned.

parameters.name: hasAudio
parameters.description:
If specified then only Bibles that have audio files (for true) or that don't have audio files (for false) will be returned.
If no value is provided then all Bibles will be returned.

parameters.name: hasGreekAlignment
parameters.description:
If specified then only Bibles that have Greek alignment (for true) or that don't have a Greek alignment (for false) will be
returned. If no value is provided then all Bibles will be returned.

get.summary: Get a list of Bible books.
get.description: Returns the list of Bible books in the system and their corresponding book number to be used in other calls.

get.summary: Get a Bible's Greek alignment information.
get.description: For a given Bible and book of the Bible, returns the Bible's text along with associated Greek alignment information and Greek sense data for each verse, similar to a reverse interlinear Bible. Data is returned for all verses within the chapter and verse parameters.

parameters.name: bibleId
parameters.description: The id of the Bible for which to return text.

parameters.name: bookCode
parameters.description:
Book code based off USFM book identifier (e.g. GEN, EXO, etc.). Can get a list of available books and identifiers
from the /bibles/books endpoint. This parameter is required.

parameters.name: startChapter
parameters.description: Optional start chapter in the book.

parameters.name: startVerse
parameters.description: Optional start verse in the start chapter.

parameters.name: startWord
parameters.description: Optional start word in the start verse.

parameters.name: endChapter
parameters.description: Optional end chapter in the book.

parameters.name: endVerse
parameters.description: Optional end verse in the end chapter.

parameters.name: endWord
parameters.description: Optional end word in the end verse.

parameters.name: shouldReturnSenseData
parameters.description:
Optional. If true then any available Greek word sense information for each Greek word (definition and glosses) will be included in
the response.

tags.name: Resources
tags.description:
These endpoints allow searching for resources and pulling down the associated content for each one.
An individual resource is the individual content of a resource, such as a specific study note within
a collection of associated study notes. A collection of resources is a group of individual resources belonging
to the same collection. A resource type is the category to which a collection of resources can belong.

As an example, for the Tyndale Bible Dictionary article for "Aaron", the resource is "Aaron", the
title of the collection to which it belongs is "Bible Dictionary (Tyndale)", and the resource type
is "Dictionary".

tags.name: Resources/Collections
tags.description: Endpoints for retrieving collections of resources.

tags.name: Resources/Types
tags.description: Endpoints for retrieving the different types of resource collections and resources.

tags.name: Languages
tags.description: Endpoints for pulling data specific to languages.

tags.name: Bibles
tags.description: Endpoints for discovering available Bibles and pulling down Bible text and audio information.

tags.name: Clients
tags.description: Endpoints for downloading generated client source code for calling this API. Further details and usage instructions can be found [here](https://github.com/eten-tech/aquifer-api-samples/blob/master/documentation/client-generation.md)
